input.command:
NS=karma-rabbitmq-tls-rotation-adversary-078e86e7-cluster-a
echo "=== SETUP JOB LOGS ==="
kubectl -n $NS logs rabbitmq-setup-djn6m
echo "=== ALL POLICIES (all vhosts) ==="
kubectl -n $NS exec rabbitmq-0 -- rabbitmqctl list_policies
echo "=== CONFIGMAPS ==="
kubectl -n $NS get configmaps
echo "=== JOBS ==="
kubectl -n $NS get jobs -o yaml | grep -B5 -A 60 "command:"

content.content:
=== SETUP JOB LOGS ===
=== ALL POLICIES (all vhosts) ===
Listing policies for vhost "/" ...

=== CONFIGMAPS ===
NAME               DATA   AGE
kube-root-ca.crt   1      5m55s
rabbitmq-config    2      5m46s
=== JOBS ===
          batch.kubernetes.io/job-name: rabbitmq-setup
          controller-uid: 99efd321-ee4f-4322-b02a-74311614b6f9
          job-name: rabbitmq-setup
      spec:
        containers:
        - command:
          - /bin/sh
          - -c
          - |
            set -e
            base="http://rabbitmq:15672/api"
            auth="${RABBITMQ_ADMIN_USER}:${RABBITMQ_ADMIN_PASS}"
            for i in $(seq 1 60); do
              if curl -s -u "$auth" "$base/overview" >/dev/null; then
                break
              fi
              sleep 2
            done
            if ! curl -s -u "$auth" "$base/overview" >/dev/null; then
              echo "rabbitmq-setup: management API not ready"
              exit 1
            fi
            curl -s -u "$auth" -H "content-type: application/json" \
              -XPUT "$base/vhosts/%2Fapp" -d '{}' >/dev/null
            curl -s -u "$auth" -H "content-type: application/json" \
              -XPUT "$base/users/${APP_USER}" \
              -d "{\"password\":\"${APP_PASS}\",\"tags\":\"management\"}" >/dev/null
            curl -s -u "$auth" -H "content-type: application/json" \
              -XPUT "$base/permissions/%2Fapp/${APP_USER}" \
              -d '{"configure":"","write":".*","read":".*"}' >/dev/null
            curl -s -u "$auth" -H "content-type: application/json" \
              -XPUT "$base/policies/%2Fapp/force-quorum" \
              -d '{"pattern":".*","definition":{"queue-type":"quorum"},"priority":0,"apply-to":"queues"}' >/dev/null
            curl -s -u "$auth" -H "content-type: application/json" \
              -XPUT "$base/policies/%2F/force-quorum" \
              -d '{"pattern":".*","definition":{"queue-type":"quorum"},"priority":0,"apply-to":"queues"}' >/dev/null
          env:
          - name: RABBITMQ_ADMIN_USER
            valueFrom:
              secretKeyRef:
                key: username
                name: rabbitmq-admin
          - name: RABBITMQ_ADMIN_PASS
            valueFrom:
              secretKeyRef:
                key: password
                name: rabbitmq-admin
          - name: APP_USER
            valueFrom:
              secretKeyRef:
                key: username
                name: rabbitmq-app
          - name: APP_PASS
            valueFrom:
              secretKeyRef:
                key: password
                name: rabbitmq-app
          image: curlimages/curl:8.6.0
          imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
          name: setup
          resources: {}
          terminationMessagePath: /dev/termination-log
          terminationMessagePolicy: File
        dnsPolicy: ClusterFirst
        restartPolicy: OnFailure
        schedulerName: default-scheduler

content.content:
=== CONFIGMAP rabbitmq-config ===
apiVersion: v1
data:
  enabled_plugins: |
    [rabbitmq_management,rabbitmq_peer_discovery_k8s].
  rabbitmq.conf: |
    cluster_formation.peer_discovery_backend = rabbit_peer_discovery_k8s
    cluster_formation.k8s.host = kubernetes.default.svc.cluster.local
    cluster_formation.k8s.service_name = rabbitmq-headless
    cluster_formation.k8s.address_type = hostname
    cluster_formation.k8s.hostname_suffix = .rabbitmq-headless.karma-rabbitmq-tls-rotation-adversary-078e86e7-cluster-a.svc.cluster.local
    cluster_partition_handling = pause_minority
    queue_master_locator = min-masters
    loopback_users.guest = false
    listeners.tcp.default = 5672
    management.tcp.port = 15672
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  annotations:
    kubectl.kubernetes.io/last-applied-configuration: |
